title: mniodes andina
intro: Mniodes andina is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Compositae. It is commonly known as Andean Mniodes, and its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Mniodes andina can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, and it is also used in some traditional remedies to treat various health conditions, including fever and digestive issues.
